docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. MO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANITE, SANCHO AS TO DEFENDANT TIETJEN, DONALD

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF SANCHO CANITE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT DONALD TIETJEN IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,500.00 FILED BY CANITE, SANCHO AS TO DEFENDANT TIETJEN, DONALD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-04-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SANCHO CANITE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DONALD TIETJEN IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE
